channel.title: Licensing on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Licensing on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Microsoft Foundry agent security capabilities in Microsoft Defender for Cloud are transitioning to a Microsoft Agent 365 license
item.description:
Starting July 1, 2026, Microsoft Foundry agent security capabilities in Microsoft Defender for Cloud will move to a Microsoft Agent 365 license. Agent protection in Defender will use Agent 365 observability logs.

  • Source: Azure Updates
